sections.heading: About the Show
sections.body: Unprofessional is a quarterly night of cabaret, where you never quite know what you'll get. Launched on Maya Suess's birthday in February 2022, the show lives in the back room of The Parkside Lounge on Houston and Attorney in the Lower East Side.

sections.heading: Allied Productions exemplifies one of the things I love about this neighborhood, which is the diverse legacy of experimental queer and radical art and performance.
Get Involved
sections.body: Want to perform? Have a wild idea? Just want to be part of whatever this is? Reach out. The show is built by its community, and the door is always open.
